title: Doors, Frames, and Hardware
reference: UFGS-inspired door and hardware clause logic to be localized for Philippine projects.

clauses.scope: Provide doors, frames, hardware, anchorage, accessories, adjustment, and installation complete in place.
materials: Door leaf, frames, hinges, locksets, closers, stops, and accessories of approved type and finish
execution: Adjust doors and hardware for proper operation
testing: Inspection of alignment, operation, hardware completeness, and finish quality
clauses.measurement: Measure by set, piece, or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include doors, frames, hardware, accessories, installation, adjustment, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Review hardware terminology and acceptance criteria to suit local project practice.

title: Aluminum-Framed Windows and Glazing
reference: UFGS-inspired clause logic for aluminum and glazing systems to be localized.

clauses.scope: Provide aluminum window assemblies, glazing, sealants, accessories, and complete installation as shown on the plans.
materials: Aluminum sections, glass, gaskets, sealants, fasteners, and accessories
execution: Provide proper glazing and sealant installation
Ensure weather-tightness and smooth operation for operable units
testing: Inspection of alignment, sealant continuity, operation, and glazing completeness
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter, set, or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include materials, fabrication, installation, sealants, hardware, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Review glass safety requirements and thickness based on local code and wind exposure where applicable.

title: Tile Work
reference: UFGS-inspired tilework clause logic to be adapted to Philippine materials and practices.

clauses.scope: Provide floor and wall tile work complete with adhesive, mortar bed where applicable, grout, trims, and accessories.
submittals: Tile layout and pattern approval when required
materials: Tiles of approved type, size, and finish
Tile adhesive, grout, trims, and accessories
execution: Lay tiles true to line and level
Grout and clean tile surfaces after curing
testing: Inspection of alignment, bond, lippage, grout finish, and hollow spots
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter of accepted tiled area.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include tiles, adhesive, grout, trims, labor, tools, and incidentals.
special_notes: Review slip resistance, wet-area detailing, and tile class based on the intended room use.

title: Suspended Ceilings and Gypsum Board
reference: UFGS-inspired ceiling clause logic to be localized for project practice.

clauses.scope: Provide suspended ceiling system complete with framing, boards, accessories, finishing, and support hangers.
materials: Metal furring, suspension hangers, fasteners, trims, and joint treatment materials
execution: Install framing rigidly and true to plane
Fasten boards properly and finish joints smoothly
Coordinate access panels and fixture openings
testing: Inspection of line and level, board finish, support spacing, and fixture coordination
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include boards, framing, hangers, finishing, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Review moisture-resistant boards for toilets, wet areas, or humid rooms where needed.

title: Fencing and Gates
reference: UFGS-inspired fencing clause logic to be localized.

clauses.scope: Provide fencing, posts, footings, gates, accessories, protective coatings, and installation complete in place.
materials: Fence fabric, posts, rails, gates, hardware, concrete for footings, and protective coatings
execution: Install gates with proper operation and locking
testing: Inspection of post alignment, tension, gate operation, and coating quality
clauses.measurement: Measure by linear meter, set, or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include posts, fabric, gates, footings, coatings, labor, tools, and incidentals.
special_notes: Review security, anti-climb, and campus access requirements where applicable.
